name: ETH Trial-00095 Transfer Feasibility
edge_rationale: If the BTC trial-00095 sweep/reclaim edge is a broader large-cap perpetual liquidity response rather than BTC-specific microstructure, the exact frozen BTC parameters should retain positive expectancy on an audited ETHUSDT dataset without parameter search.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: Visible ETH liquidity levels may create stop-run and reclaim behavior similar to BTC. The transfer test checks whether the same deterministic sweep/reclaim geometry and confluence contract captures that mechanism on ETH.
required_data: 1h candles derived from complete 15m candles inside replay temp DB
baseline_reference: BTC trial-00095: ER 2.110, PF 3.95, 47 validated WF trades / 271 full replay campaign trades depending artifact context
frozen_assumptions: No production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, core, execution, orchestrator, or settings changes.
No parameter search, no threshold tuning, no post-hoc rescue.
Only symbol changes from BTCUSDT to ETHUSDT, in research-only settings object.
Use the audited ETH_HISTORICAL_BACKFILL_DATASET_V1 snapshot as source.
Source ETH dataset is copied to a temporary replay DB before BacktestRunner writes trade artifacts.
1h candles may be derived from complete 15m candles only for replay compatibility.
Force-order/liquidation context is unavailable and remains empty optional context.
expected_observation: If transfer is real, frozen trial-00095 should produce at least 20 ETH trades, positive ER above 1.0, PF above 1.5, tolerable drawdown, and at least two positive chronological validation folds.

kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any change to runtime/core/settings/execution invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.parameter_tuning: Any ETH-specific threshold tuning invalidates transfer evidence.
kill_criteria.source_db_mutation: Mutating the audited ETH source snapshot invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.lookahead_or_alignment_bug: Any timeframe alignment bug invalidates results.
kill_criteria.insufficient_data: If audited ETH dataset is unavailable, stop rather than substitute unaudited data.

failure_modes: BTC trial-00095 geometry is BTC-specific and does not transfer to ETH.
ETH volatility scale differs enough that exact BTC thresholds are too strict or too loose.
No force-order data slightly changes confluence behavior versus BTC historical runs.
Low signal count makes transfer inconclusive rather than failed.
ETH gaps cluster around important market events and distort fold-level stability.
out_of_scope: Any change to BTC PAPER bot or M4 monitoring.
author: Codex
